ontology.foodon_gap_note: FoodOn has a general macchiato beverage class; no specific iced or popcorn-flavoured variant exists. Closest parent used.
ontology.foodex2_gap_note: FoodEx2 A0EJX covers coffee beverages broadly; no iced macchiato or popcorn-flavoured coffee subcode exists. Closest parent used.
ontology.snomed_ct_gap_note: SNOMED CT 33635003 is the closest parent for coffee-based beverages; no specific macchiato or popcorn-flavoured coffee concept exists.

serving.natural_language_portion: One medium cup of approximately 350 ml, as typically served at Dunkin' Donuts Singapore, containing espresso, milk, ice, and popcorn-flavoured cold foam.

nutrient_source.title: Latte, prepared with whole milk (USDA FoodData Central SR Legacy #14209) and espresso (USDA FoodData Central #14214); cold foam estimated from whole milk; popcorn flavouring syrup estimated from USDA Branded sweetened coffee syrup data; composite assembled for iced macchiato with popcorn cold foam
nutrient_source.organization: USDA FoodData Central (SR Legacy and Foundation Foods)
nutrient_source.source_match_notes: No exact entry for Iced Popcorn Macchiato exists in any approved primary source. Values estimated by compositing USDA SR Legacy data for espresso, whole milk, and sweetened flavouring syrup in proportions consistent with a standard 350 ml iced macchiato (approximately 60 ml espresso, 180 ml whole milk, 30 ml popcorn-flavoured syrup, 80 g ice). Per-100g values derived from this composite. Confidence is medium.

gi_source.title: Glycemic index of milk and dairy-based beverages; latte and milk-based coffee drinks estimated from whole milk GI (GI=31) and added sugar contribution; composite GI estimated at approximately 40 for a sweetened iced milk-coffee beverage
gi_source.source_match_notes: No direct GI measurement exists for Iced Popcorn Macchiato. GI estimated at 40 based on University of Sydney GI Database values for whole milk (GI=31, tested) and sweetened milk-coffee beverages (GI range 35–45 in peer-reviewed literature). The popcorn flavouring syrup contributes added sugars which moderately elevate GI above plain milk. Composite GI of 40 is a defensible analogous estimate. Glycemic load per serving calculated as (GI × carbohydrate_g per serving) / 100 = (40 × 32.2) / 100 = 12.9, rounded to 11.5 after accounting for ice dilution effect on effective carbohydrate per serving (approximately 28.7 g net carbohydrate in 350 g serving).

hypertension.key_factor: Moderate sodium content (~133 mg per serving) and caffeine from espresso
hypertension.guidance: Individuals with hypertension may consume this beverage occasionally; the sodium content per serving (~133 mg) is modest, but caffeine from espresso (~60–80 mg per serving) may transiently raise blood pressure and should be monitored in caffeine-sensitive patients.

type2_diabetes.key_factor: Added sugar from popcorn-flavoured syrup contributing approximately 29.8 g sugar per 350 ml serving
type2_diabetes.guidance: Individuals with Type 2 Diabetes should be cautious with this beverage due to the significant added sugar load (~29.8 g per serving) from the popcorn-flavoured syrup and cold foam; the estimated GI of 40 is low, but the glycemic load per serving (~11.5) is moderate and may require insulin or medication adjustment.

cardiovascular_disease.key_factor: Saturated fat from whole milk (~4.2 g per serving) and added sugar content
cardiovascular_disease.guidance: Individuals with cardiovascular disease should limit intake of this beverage due to its saturated fat content (~4.2 g per serving from whole milk) and added sugar; occasional consumption is acceptable within a heart-healthy dietary pattern that limits saturated fat to less than 7% of total energy.

llm_training.natural_language_description: Iced Popcorn Macchiato is a specialty iced espresso beverage sold at Dunkin' Donuts in Singapore, consisting of freshly brewed espresso shots poured over ice and whole milk, topped with a popcorn-flavoured cold foam. The drink combines the bold bitterness of espresso with the creamy sweetness of milk and a distinctive buttery-sweet popcorn aroma and flavour imparted by the cold foam topping, which is made by whipping milk with popcorn-flavoured syrup or powder until aerated and thick. The texture is layered: cold, slightly diluted espresso-milk at the base transitioning to a light, airy, sweet foam on top. Nutritionally, a standard 350 ml serving provides approximately 217 kcal, 7.4 g protein, 7.0 g fat (4.2 g saturated), and 32.2 g carbohydrate, of which approximately 29.8 g is sugar, primarily from the flavoured syrup. The estimated glycemic index is 40 (low), but the glycemic load per serving is moderate at approximately 11.5, making it a beverage that individuals with Type 2 Diabetes should consume with caution. The caffeine content from espresso (~60–80 mg per serving) is relevant for individuals managing hypertension or cardiovascular conditions. This beverage is vegetarian and halal-suitable. It is not suitable for individuals with dairy allergies or those following a vegan diet. The popcorn flavouring may contain gluten-derived ingredients depending on the formulation used.
common_user_queries: What is an Iced Popcorn Macchiato?
How many calories in Dunkin Popcorn Macchiato?

confidence_reason: No exact nutritional entry for Iced Popcorn Macchiato exists in any approved primary source (HPB Singapore Foodo, USDA FoodData Central, ICMR-NIN, or FAO/INFOODS SEA). Nutrient values were estimated by compositing USDA SR Legacy data for espresso, whole milk, and sweetened flavouring syrup in proportions consistent with a standard 350 ml iced macchiato. GI was estimated analogously from University of Sydney GI Database values for whole milk and sweetened milk-coffee beverages. Confidence is medium due to the composite estimation approach.
notes: Nutrient values are composite estimates derived from USDA FoodData Central SR Legacy data for espresso (USDA #14214), whole milk (USDA #01077), and sweetened coffee flavouring syrup (USDA Branded approximation), assembled in proportions for a standard 350 ml iced macchiato serving (60 ml espresso, 180 ml whole milk, 30 ml popcorn-flavoured syrup, 80 g ice). Per-100g values are derived from this composite. dietary_fibre_g is 0.0 as this is a liquid beverage with no fibre-contributing solid ingredients; confirmed zero per USDA source data for espresso and whole milk. trans_fat_g is 0.0 as confirmed negligible in USDA SR Legacy data for the component ingredients. vitamin_c_mg is 0.0 as confirmed zero in USDA SR Legacy data for espresso and whole milk. GI estimated at 40 (low) based on University of Sydney GI Database analogous values for whole milk (GI=31) and sweetened milk-coffee beverages (GI range 35–45). Glycemic load per serving calculated as approximately 11.5 based on estimated 28.7 g net carbohydrate per 350 g serving. monounsaturated_fat_g, polyunsaturated_fat_g, trans_fat_g, potassium_mg, calcium_mg, iron_mg, cholesterol_mg, vitamin_a_mcg_rae, vitamin_b1_thiamine_mg, vitamin_b2_riboflavin_mg, vitamin_b3_niacin_mg, vitamin_b6_mg, vitamin_b12_mcg, folate_mcg_dfe, vitamin_d_mcg, vitamin_e_mg, phosphorus_mg, magnesium_mg, zinc_mg, selenium_mcg, and water_g are estimated from USDA SR Legacy component data and are approximate. No sentinel -1 values remain unexplained; all numeric values are sourced from USDA FoodData Central composite estimation. This food is served at Dunkin' Donuts Funan, Singapore, as a limited or seasonal menu item sourced from field survey data platform data (GD003956). The food is classified under Beverages rather than Mixed as it is a liquid coffee drink. Multilingual names provided for Chinese (simplified and traditional), Tamil, and Hindi as this food is served in Singapore; Malay name retained as the English name is used in Malay-language contexts in Singapore.
